message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequenceGroupBorderThickness 2

box "Client" #LightGray
participant "client" as client
participant "tcpclient" as tcpclient
end box

box "Server" #LightGray
participant "tcpserver" as tcpserver
participant "server" as server
end box

server -> tcpserver : listen
note over tcpserver #DeepSkyBlue
  **LISTEN**
end note

client -> tcpclient : connect
tcpclient -> tcpserver : SYN
note over tcpclient #MediumTurquoise
  **SYN-SENT**
end note
note over tcpserver #DeepSkyBlue
  **SYN-RECEIVED**
end note
tcpserver -> tcpclient : SYN, ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK

note over tcpclient #MediumSeaGreen
  **ESTABLISHED**
end note
note over tcpserver #MediumSeaGreen
  **ESTABLISHED**
end note

tcpserver -> server : EPOLLIN
server -> tcpserver : write
tcpserver -> tcpclient : PSH, ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK

tcpclient -> client : EPOLLIN
client -> tcpclient : read

server -> tcpserver : close
note over tcpserver #MediumPurple
  **FIN_WAIT1**
end note
tcpserver -> tcpclient : FIN, ACK
note over tcpclient #Violet
  **CLOSE_WAIT**
end note
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK
note over tcpserver #Orange
  **FIN_WAIT2**
end note

tcpclient -> client : EPOLLRDHUP
client -> tcpclient : close
note over tcpclient #Magenta
  **LAST_ACK**
end note
tcpclient -> tcpserver : FIN
tcpserver -> tcpclient : ACK

note over tcpclient #OrangeRed
  **CLOSE**
end note
note over tcpserver #Yellow
  **TIMEWAIT**
end note

tcpserver -> tcpserver : timer 60s
note over tcpserver #OrangeRed
  **CLOSE**
end note

@enduml
```
